SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Continued To Jul-16-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-01-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Gus Harput, Appellant/Defendant, appearing on her own behalf with witness Allen Lee.
Aaron T. Cassat Esq., appearing for Respondent/Plaintiff FED EX with Cheryl Davidson.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Cheryl Davidson testfies on behalf of FED EX. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A-FED EX receipt
Exhibit B-FED EX order
Exhibit C-Tracking history
Exhibit D-Customer detail screen
Exhibit E-Customer interaction
Exhibit F-March 23, 2015 delivery information
Exhibit G-Customer exception request
Exhibit H-Customer exception request
Exhibit I-Package Inquiry
Exhibit J-Customer detail screen
Exhibit K-Results of scan by Airbill Query
Exhibit L-Shipment information report
Exhibit M-Customer interaction
Exhibit N-Delivery information
Exhibit O-Customer exception request
Exhibit P-Package Inquiry
Exhibit Q-Customer detail screen
Exhibit R-Results of scan by Airbill Query
Exhibit S-Shipment information report
Exhibit Y-Customer interaction
Exhibit W-Serivce guide
Exhibit X-Affidavit of Clement E. Klank III
Exhibit Y Bench brief
Exhibit Z-Affidavit of Elizabeth Moore

Gus Harput testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1-Total claim

At the conclustion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JPT Theresa Moore, Clerk: J. Murphy, Not Reoprted (525)
